summary: All 7 revision 12 fixes verified via live browser testing. All regressions from previous cycles confirmed passing.

fixes.description: Outline dotted: focus-visible:outline-dotted replaces focus-visible:outline-dashed on nav items and sub-items
fixes.evidence: Tab to .header-main-item-button (6 presses): outline-style=dotted, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255). Also confirmed on sub-item via ArrowDown regression.

fixes.description: Focus outlines on search/CTA: All 7 interactive elements (logo, desktop search button, desktop CTA, hamburger, mobile SEP link, mobile search button, mobile CTA) now have focus-visible outline classes
fixes.evidence: Desktop search submit button (3 Tab presses): aria-label=Submit search, outline-style=dotted, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255). Desktop CTA link (5 Tab presses): TAG=A, text=Student Engagement Platform, outline-style=dotted, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255), accent color. All 7 elements confirmed in code review of HeaderMain.php lines 45, 70, 90, 114, 127, 164, 187.

fixes.description: Spacer hidden by default: .header-main-spacer has `hidden` class, JS toggles to `block` when fixed. Should NOT add height when inactive.
fixes.evidence: Pre-scroll: spacer has hidden=true, computed display=none, height=0px. Post-scroll (scrollY=600): spacer has hidden=false, has block=true, computed display=block, height=133px.

fixes.description: Mobile hamburger visibility: Toggle button visible (text-white on dark background)
fixes.evidence: At 375px viewport: toggle display=block, toggle color=rgb(255,255,255), toggle visibility=visible.

fixes.description: Mobile fixed + menu open: When fixedOnScrollMobile and menu is open, header stays fixed
fixes.evidence: At 375px, scrollY=402, menu opened via JS click: header.scrolling=true, header.menu-open=true, position=fixed, spacer display=block, spacer height=108px.

fixes.description: Mobile menu max-height: Menu height constrained to calc(100dvh - var(--fixed-offset,80px)) with overflow-y-auto
fixes.evidence: At 375px with menu open: nav max-height=868px (100dvh - fixed-offset), overflow-y=auto, actual nav height=560px (content fits within constraint).

fixes.description: Mobile nav border: No visible border shift on menu close (padding constant, hidden by overflow)
fixes.evidence: Nav has constant max-md:pt-4 max-md:pb-8 (paddingTop=16px, paddingBottom=32px) regardless of menu-open state. Overflow-hidden when closed prevents layout shift.

regressions.description: ArrowDown key opens submenu and moves focus to first sub-item
regressions.evidence: ArrowDown from About button: sub-item TAG=A, text=Who We Are, outline-style=dotted, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255).

regressions.description: Escape key closes submenu and returns focus to parent button
regressions.evidence: Escape from sub-item: focus=About button, btn aria-expanded=false, submenu hidden=true.

regressions.description: Spacer hides and header returns to static when scrolled back to top
regressions.evidence: scrollY=0: header.scrolling=false, position=static, spacer has hidden=true, computed display=none, height=0px.
Confirmed in HeaderMain.php line 150: role=menubar, aria-label=Main navigation, aria-orientation=horizontal.

regressions.description: body.css *:focus-visible in @layer base allows Tailwind utilities to override (FQA-005)
regressions.evidence: Header elements show white dotted outline. Non-header button retains global black dotted default.

codeReviewNotes: HeaderMain.php line 197: spacer correctly has `hidden` class by default
HeaderMain.js showSpacer/hideSpacer correctly toggle hidden/block classes
All 7 interactive elements have focus-visible:outline-dotted focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2
Mobile menu max-h uses calc(100dvh-var(--fixed-offset,80px)) with overflow-y-auto
openMenu() at lines 255-259 forces scrolling+scrolling-up classes and calls showSpacer() when mobile+fixedScrollMobile
validate_all: PASS (0 errors, 9 warnings — all pre-existing)
